title: Statistics
seoTitle: Game Of Darts Statistics | BarkinMad Studios
description: Track your progress, review your performance, and discover how your darts game improves over time.
summary: Detailed player statistics help you monitor your performance, compare sessions, and identify areas for improvement.

sections.heading: Track Your Progress
paragraphs: Game Of Darts records detailed statistics after every completed match, helping you understand your strengths and identify areas where you can improve.
Whether you're practising on your own, playing league matches, or competing with friends, your statistics build a clear picture of your progress over time.

sections.heading: Match Statistics
paragraphs: Every completed match records a range of performance information. The exact statistics available depend on the selected game mode, giving you meaningful insights that match the way you're playing.

sections.heading: Player History
paragraphs: Statistics are stored for every player, making it easy to compare today's performance with previous matches.
View your results by player and game mode to see how your skills develop over weeks, months, or even years.

sections.heading: Advanced Statistics
paragraphs: Advanced Statistics provide additional charts, trends, and historical analysis for players who want to explore their performance in greater detail.
Access is available by meeting the in-game requirements or through Premium Access.

sections.heading: Turn Statistics into Better Results
paragraphs: The best players review their performance as well as their scores. Watching your averages improve, increasing your checkout percentage, and reducing missed doubles are all signs that your game is moving in the right direction.
Combine your statistics with regular practice against DartBot or friends to continue improving every time you play.

images.caption: Track your progress and improve over time.

featureShowcases.heading: See Your Progress
featureShowcases.summary: Every completed match helps build a clearer picture of your performance.
body: Review your averages, checkouts, high scores, and game-specific statistics to see how your game is developing over time.
Whether you're chasing a new personal best or preparing for league matches, your statistics help highlight both your strengths and the areas that deserve extra practice.
bullets: Review averages, high scores, and checkout performance.

image.caption: Every match adds to your journey as a player.

featureShowcases.heading: Watch Your Game Improve
featureShowcases.summary: Compare your current performance with previous sessions and measure your improvement.
body: Real improvement doesn't happen in a single match. By reviewing your statistics over time, it's easier to see how practice, DartBot sessions, and competitive matches are helping you become a better player.
Long-term statistics make every game more rewarding by showing how far you've come.
bullets: Perfect for measuring improvement through regular practice.

image.caption: Every match contributes to your long-term progress.
